instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "The Asset Administration Shell (AAS) includes a Legal submodel specifying data ownership through 'dataController' and 'dataProcessor' attributes, and a Data Protection submodel enforcing GDPR compliance with data anonymization techniques (e.g., k-anonymity), consent management workflows, and data retention period specifications (Document 50)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The document cites SysML (including IBDs), AADL, ACME, and MontiArc as industry standards for architecture description languages (ADLs) used in Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) to describe system components, interfaces, interconnections, and behavior within Digital Twin systems."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security measures include Transport Layer Security (TLS) encryption and username/password authentication for MQTT communication using Mosquitto (Document 52), and the Asset Administration Shell's Security submodel implementing role-based access control (RBAC), OAuth2 authentication, X.509 certificate-based authentication, and encryption standards for data in transit and at rest (Document 50)."
]
